_comment: Budget raised 6656->8192 (6.5 KiB -> 8 KiB) when the plugin gained a `meta.icon` (single tree-shaken `Images` glyph from lucide-react, the same per-plugin-bundled convention as export-html/version-history/design-system). lucide-react is a regular dependency project-wide, not externalized, so the one icon lands in the entry chunk (~0.8 kB gzipped). Earlier the easy win was banked by sourcing the version from version.ts instead of importing the whole package.json. Raised again 8192->8704 (8 KiB -> 8.5 KiB) when the public surface gained `isResumableAdapter` (PRD 0004 §5.1 resumable/multipart upload contract): the interfaces are types (erased), but the narrowing helper is a runtime export that lands in the eager entry. The built-in resumable machinery is kept OUT of the eager entry on purpose: the PRD 0004 M2 session store (`createUploadSessionStore` + `fingerprintFile`) ships from the lazy ./session-store subpath (it has no eager consumer — plugin.ts never imports it), and the M3 runner / M4 S3 resumable adapter should likewise ship as lazy subpath chunks (like ./providers/unsplash and ./adapters/s3). Only the type-level contract (UploadSessionStore, ResumableUploadAdapter, …) lives in the barrel, where it is erased. So the eager budget stayed at 8704 rather than growing for M2. 8704 leaves modest headroom while still catching order-of-magnitude regressions.
